title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IV.  EMERGENCY INTERIM

LEGISLATIVE SUCCESSION

§61.  Short title

This Part shall be known as the "Emergency Interim Legislative Succession Act."

Acts 1963, No. 113, §1.
